message:
test(quic_native): fill QH3-U3 stream/transport/tls/connection gaps (63 tests)

Add gap-filling tests across all 4 quic_native modules:
- transport.rs: 15 new tests (state transitions, loss detection, congestion
  avoidance, PTO backoff, RTT edge cases, cross-space tracking)
- streams.rs: 9 new tests (offset overflow, flow control limits, writable
  stream round-robin, recv range merge, FIN edge cases, reset/stop)
- tls.rs: 8 new tests (key update lifecycle, handshake guards, CryptoLevel
  ordering, Display impls)
- connection.rs: 30 new tests (cancellation, close_immediately, drain-to-
  closed polling, stream ops after close, key update API, Display/From)

Total quic_native: 84 existing + 63 new = 147 tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
